creator: bg1tpt@gmail.com
text:
Thank you for your patch. But it seems lost a file and a directory in pkg-plist.
They are %%PHPBBDIR%%/includes/utf/data/confusables.php and @dirrm
%%PHPBBDIR%%/install/data.

The patch in the attachment has been added this two lines.

On Tue, 7 Aug 2007 00:40:07 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of www/phpbb-devel,
>
> Please note that PR ports/115256 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/115256
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
